blockerNotes: Migration history and zero drift pass. The datasource is confirmed as one_deal_app, non-owner, NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS with RLS and FORCE RLS enabled. SQL-level wrong-tenant proof still saw the deal because the baseline migration left deals_app_access USING (TRUE). PostgreSQL ORs permissive policies, so known legacy allow-all policies on deals, audit and ledger must be removed by the production RLS artifact before strict policies are created.
